search_strategy.description: Find AI companies across all sectors and stages that are actively hiring
search_queries: AI companies hiring machine learning engineers
artificial intelligence startups with job openings

subdomains.name: AI Research Companies
subdomains.focus: Academic and research-focused AI organizations, including university spin-offs and dedicated research labs focused on advancing fundamental AI capabilities
search_queries: AI research labs hiring machine learning scientists
academic AI research companies with job openings
university AI lab spin-offs recruiting engineers

subdomains.name: Healthcare AI
subdomains.focus: AI companies specifically focused on healthcare, medical imaging, drug discovery, clinical applications, and patient care. These companies face unique regulatory requirements (FDA, HIPAA) and domain expertise needs
search_queries: healthcare AI companies hiring ML engineers
medical imaging AI startups with job postings
drug discovery AI companies hiring data scientists

subdomains.name: Enterprise AI Solutions
subdomains.focus: B2B AI companies providing enterprise software, automation, business intelligence, and productivity tools to corporate customers. Focus on sales, marketing, operations, and analytics applications
search_queries: B2B AI automation companies with job openings
AI productivity tools companies hiring engineers

subdomains.name: Consumer AI Products
subdomains.focus: AI companies building consumer-facing products including apps, services, and platforms for end users. Different from enterprise with focus on UX, scale, and consumer behavior
search_queries: B2C AI platform companies with job openings
AI mobile apps companies hiring product engineers

subdomain_analyzer_output.reasoning: Split into four major application domains that represent distinct sectors with different customers, business models, regulatory requirements, and technical challenges. Research companies focus on fundamental advances vs commercialization. Healthcare has unique compliance needs. Enterprise serves B2B with different sales cycles and requirements than consumer products. These four categories provide comprehensive coverage of the AI hiring landscape without over-fragmenting the search space.
